reviews.comment:
Completísimo, buena atención en la playa y en el kiosco

(Translated by Google)
Very complete, good service on the beach and at the kiosk

reviews.comment:
Excelente los  playeros, muy buena atención,, pudimos alojarnos gracias a ellos y las chicas del centro de atención full. Debería ser todos así contar con info ,puesto que uno llega y son las primeras personas con las cuales habla y pide información del lugat

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were excellent, very attentive; we were able to stay thanks to them and the girls at the information center. Every place should be like that, providing information, since they're the first people you talk to when you arrive and ask for details about the place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnOHFhMzFnRRAB
